specialCoins.name: The Last Liturgy
specialCoins.effect: Once per session, when Hadrian openly invokes Watchful Eye liturgy aloud in front of allies during a tense or pivotal moment (full chant in Old Imperial), he gains 1 Gunta Coin to spend immediately or save until end of scene.
specialCoins.refreshNotes: Invoked + spent Day 26 Sess06 chamber R2 — bumped Ranged 9 on G1 slug-shot. Refreshes at Session 07 start. Ties to Religion (Ghost) + Old Imperial.

harm.statusNote: Took 2 harm Session 06 R1 slug from G1 (half-mitigated by Shellock). Clean by campaign end.

advancementHistory.notes: End of Session 06 — degree-3 Shadow Encounter survival (Halt's chamber, clean win).

identity.appearance: Heavy-built. Clean-shaven, close-cut grey hair. Hard eyes, scarred forearms. Tall (~6'2"). Aramid (now Shellock) under a long traveling coat with a visible Watchful Eye sigil on the left lapel.
identity.speech: Old Imperial cadence — Watchful Eye education. Pidgin with formal emphasis. Hro-hro learned during a forced detour through Hynian territory in his soldier days.
identity.habits: Speaks little. Clipped and direct. Prays three times a day silently — Watchful Eye liturgy. Cracks knuckles before action. Touches the Watchful Eye sigil before going through doors. Eats meals standing up. Sleeps light.
identity.orientation: Was married. Widowed 8 years. Doesn't expect to be again.
identity.demeanor: Solid, immovable. Stands close to allies. Knows how to take a hit meant for another.

hooks.title: Origin
hooks.body: Cradle Imperial-leftover military district. Joined the Watchful Eye Knights of the Listening Star (a templar order, now defunct) in his late teens. Trained in faith + arms.

hooks.title: Career
hooks.body: Served in Vatori Frontier conflicts as a templar-soldier. Knight order disbanded after a heretical scandal involving the Inner Circle. Hadrian refused to denounce; left with no rank, no pension, no name in current Watchful Eye doctrine — but with the training and the icon.

hooks.title: Saira
hooks.body: Wife. Civilian, killed in Vatori shelling eight years ago while he was deployed. He blames himself. Wears her wedding band on a cord. Picked up Hro-hro during that same Hynian deployment.

hooks.title: Why this job
hooks.body: Solom Kroth pays fair to deniable veterans. Hadrian doesn't ask why. The 100 E total goes to Saira's surviving sister (Mira Volk) and her children, whom Hadrian has supported for eight years.

hooks.title: Inner Circle heresy
hooks.body: The Watchful Eye Knights' Inner Circle heresy. He won't talk about it. Yet.

hooks.title: Vatori officer
hooks.body: A Vatori officer who may have been involved in the shelling that killed Saira.

hooks.title: Order's relics
hooks.body: Hadrian carries one icon. Where are the others?

hooks.title: Sister Halen
hooks.body: NEW Sess06: Watchful Eye chapterhouse abbess (Cradle, north district). Will share Brother Vell's old habits / support if Hadrian pursues vendetta. Ally.

characters.notes: Prime: any armor + any weapon. Two attacks once per combat in place of one. Protect ally for one round (enemies get Speed roll). Double Bulk vs poison/disease, double Ghost vs death. Acts as normal while injured but half rolls; if harmed while already injured, dies in d20 minutes on failed death Ghost roll. Cash on hand: 50 P working + 850 P stashed at Iy-Lan's safe (now Iy-Lan dead — funds inherited by adept-house per her wishes; access pending). Mira rent paid forward 2 months from Day 22.

artisticMod.description: Special Gunta Coin: 'The Last Liturgy.' Once per session, when Hadrian openly invokes Watchful Eye liturgy aloud in front of allies during a tense or pivotal moment (full chant in Old Imperial), he gains 1 Gunta Coin to spend immediately or save until end of scene.
artisticMod.drawback: Requires public liturgical invocation in Old Imperial — narrative cost in non-friendly company.

advancementHistory.notes: End of Session 06 — degree-3 Shadow Encounter survival (Halt's chamber, clean win).

identity.appearance: Slim. Pale. Short black hair, undercut on the left side. Vatori-Imperial mixed features — sharp cheekbones, narrow eyes. Faint scar across the right eyebrow. Long charcoal coat over plain grey utility fatigues. Worn leather satchel.
identity.speech: Pidgin with Vatori cadence — clipped, precise, slight rolling r's. Tends to undersell. Quotes formulae and old documents from memory.
identity.habits: Mutters in Vatori under her breath when computing or hacking. Sketches diagrams with a stylus on her left palm when thinking. Wears HoloH-attuned headphones around her neck. Calls her HoloH bond 'the song' — never names it directly. Skips meals when working a problem. Drinks tea, never coffee.
identity.orientation: Open about it; doesn't make a thing of it.
identity.demeanor: Coiled and a bit tense. Tracks doorways and exits. Has been in trouble before.

hooks.title: Origin
hooks.body: Daughter of a Vatori field-engineer mother and a Cradle Imperial-scribe father. Grew up between Vatori encampments and Cradle technical schools. Mixed loyalty — neither side trusts her fully.

hooks.title: Career
hooks.body: Early 20s freelancing for the Cyber State — payment processors, registry tweaks, occasional industrial espionage. Earned her holographic interface on credit.

hooks.title: The bond
hooks.body: HoloH started reaching her three years ago — static in dreams, then a presence she couldn't deny. She doesn't trust it. It has saved her hands when a cyber dive went bad. She calls it 'the song.'

hooks.title: Why this job
hooks.body: Solom Kroth is a Cyber State referral. Pay knocks real points off her holographic-interface debt (now CLEARED). Cradle Cyber State's interest in the Union Front overlaps Solom's. Officially deniable.

hooks.title: Cyber State fixer
hooks.body: Tor Ka — Cyber State fixer she previously owed 300 P to. CLEARED Day 6. Wants what, specifically — long term?

hooks.title: HoloH's interest
hooks.body: Why now, why her. HoloH-listening classification suggests she's rare.

hooks.title: Vatori uncle
hooks.body: Mother's brother. Surveillance worker in Vatori District 5. Hasn't spoken to her in two years. Beneficiary on file with Solom.

hooks.title: Old hack
hooks.body: An old hack she ran on a Cradle relay system years ago. Looked clean but left a footprint. She's never been sure who saw it.

hooks.title: Veska Mort spot job
hooks.body: Tor Ka's bounty — now 500 E. Veska briefly spotted in Cradle during party's absence.

characters.notes: Core: Force Armor or lighter only. Half rolls with weapons taking up more than 1 slot. Recovers nanite harm at twice normal rate. Double rolls vs hostile formulae + mind effects. HoloH bond: easier access to cyber/electronic systems; chance of awaking dead artifacts; clean roll on retried failures (cyber/electronic). Cash on hand: 50 P working + 362 P stashed at Iy-Lan's safe. Cyber State debt to Tor Ka cleared Day 6. Heal scroll USED Day 26 Sess06; frag grenade USED Day 26 Sess06 chamber R1 (missed, single-stone splash); frontanium pry-bar USED Day 26 Sess06 (L4 door breach + chamber R4 positioning).
characters.coreBondNotes: HoloH-listening — rare classification, identified by Cradle Cyber State adept-counselor Day 22. Calls it 'the song.'

artisticMod.description: Holographic Hacker Interface (Maker-tier, normally unbuildable from scratch). 1 e/w energy draw, no slot.
artisticMod.drawback: Originally owed 300 P to a Cradle Cyber State fixer (Tor Ka) — debt CLEARED Day 6. Cyber State retains long-term leverage.

implants.name: Witness
implants.drawback: Chronic photosensitive migraines. Half rolls Ranged in bright direct sunlight or strong artificial light.
implants.notes: Mitigation: tinted goggles (~5 P, ½ slot) suppress drawback but dim peripheral vision.

harm.statusNote: Used Heal scroll Day 26 Sess06 L3 R3 (self-heal d6=3).

changes: Close floored at 1 (already at 3 above floor)
Ranged floored at 1 (already at 6 above floor)
advancementHistory.notes: End of Session 06 — degree-3 Shadow Encounter survival (Halt's chamber, clean win).

identity.appearance: Lean, weathered. Sun-darkened skin. Grey at temples. Old kinetic-burn scar across left forearm.
identity.speech: Pidgin with traces of Imperial cadence — long vowels, formal phrasings. Imperial slips through when tired or angry.
identity.habits: Cleans Last Chance every night (ritual). Writes in Old Imperial cursive. Chews dried khell-root when nervous. Hums Watchful Eye liturgy when concentrating. Addresses strangers by surname. Flips bronze Imperial coin when undecided.
identity.demeanor: Quiet. Watches before he speaks. Doesn't waste motion.

hooks.title: Origin
hooks.body: Late Itori-era Cradle. Imperial-leftover scholar district. Educated by Watchful Eye monks before drifting into wilderness work.

hooks.title: Career
hooks.body: 20+ years as Outrider in the Hynian region. Knows the trails, the weather, the ruins.

hooks.title: Witness implant
hooks.body: Cradle ASC clinic, paid by an unnamed mentor. Migraines started years later. Won't replace it. Won't say why.

hooks.title: Vella (privately supported)
hooks.body: Beneficiary on file with Solom — Vella, daughter of Osric's late mentor. Chronic nanite-related condition. Monthly treatments are expensive.

hooks.title: Vatori operative
hooks.body: Past run-in with a Vatori operative who let him walk away — unfinished business.

hooks.title: Letter from Garon Krell
hooks.body: NEW Day 23: Old Outrider commander wrote — family scandal. Unresolved thread.

characters.notes: Apt rules: crit on 19 AND 20. Build half parts. 1 H scrolls usable at 2 H. Armor: Force Armor or lighter; unarmored = full Apt bonuses. Cash on hand: 48 P working + 50 P stashed at Iy-Lan's (Kira fronted Day 26 Sess06 ammo + stim; no Osric outlay). Vella treatment paid forward 12 months from Day 22. Last Chance spaced ability USED Day 26 Sess06 L3 R2 (24hr cooldown). Heal scroll USED Day 26 Sess06 L3 R3 (self-heal d6=3).

artisticMod.description: Eye Implant 'Witness' — cybernetic targeting eye. +2 Ranged.
artisticMod.drawback: Chronic photosensitive migraines. Half rolls Ranged in bright direct sunlight or strong artificial light. Tinted goggles mitigate but dim peripheral vision.
